name: @openclaw/memory-mem0
description: memU long-term memory integration for OpenClaw

scripts.test:regression: rm -rf /tmp/memu-regression && npx tsc --project tsconfig.json --outDir /tmp/memu-regression && node /tmp/memu-regression/tests/outbox.test.js && node /tmp/memu-regression/tests/candidate-queue.test.js && node /tmp/memu-regression/tests/capture-e2e.test.js && node /tmp/memu-regression/tests/capture-fallback.test.js && node /tmp/memu-regression/tests/e2e-lifecycle.test.js
